title: Stream Listening
description: Subscribe to a stream of numbers and print only the even ones.
problemStatement:
You can transform streams! Given a list `[1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6]`, turn it into a stream with `Stream.fromIterable()`. Use `.where()` to filter for even numbers and print them.

**Expected Output:** 
`2` 
`4` 
`6`
